Alex Paulsen.note: Paulsen gives New Zealand a modern goalkeeper option, comfortable reacting quickly and playing short.
Alex Paulsen.noteZh: 保尔森给新西兰带来现代门将选择，反应快，也能舒服地短传出球。

Alex Rufer.note: Rufer is a midfield organizer, useful when New Zealand need structure around second balls.
Alex Rufer.noteZh: 鲁弗是中场组织者，当新西兰需要围绕第二落点保持结构时很有用。

Ben Old.note: Old gives New Zealand a direct wide runner, especially useful for quick counters from deep.
Ben Old.noteZh: 本·奥尔德给新西兰带来直接边路跑动，尤其适合从深位发动快速反击。

Ben Waine.note: Waine works across the front line, pressing centre-backs and arriving for loose balls.
Ben Waine.noteZh: 韦恩能横向覆盖锋线，压迫中卫并冲抢松散球。

Callan Elliot.note: Elliot adds right-side running, helpful when New Zealand need width and recovery speed together.
Callan Elliot.noteZh: 埃利奥特增加右侧跑动，当新西兰同时需要宽度和回追速度时很有帮助。

Chris Wood.note: Wood is New Zealand's reference point, turning crosses and set pieces into real scoring pressure.
Chris Wood.noteZh: 克里斯·伍德是新西兰支点，能把传中和定位球转成真正的得分压力。

Elijah Just.note: Just gives New Zealand tidy wide work, pressing hard and slipping inside for quick combinations.
Elijah Just.noteZh: 贾斯特给新西兰带来整洁的边路工作，能强力压迫并内收快速配合。

Finn Surman.note: Surman gives New Zealand a composed young centre-back who can defend the box and pass forward.
Finn Surman.noteZh: 瑟曼给新西兰带来冷静的年轻中卫，能防守禁区，也能向前传球。

Francis de Vries.note: De Vries offers left-side balance, useful for early service and steady defensive width.
Francis de Vries.noteZh: 德弗里斯提供左侧平衡，适合早传和稳定的防守宽度。

Francis De Vries.note: De Vries offers left-side balance, useful for early service and steady defensive width.
Francis De Vries.noteZh: 德弗里斯提供左侧平衡，适合早传和稳定的防守宽度。

Jesse Randall.note: Randall is a speed option from wide areas, best when New Zealand can release him into space.
Jesse Randall.noteZh: 兰德尔是边路速度选择，当新西兰能把他送入空间时最有效。

Joe Bell.note: Bell is New Zealand's passing rhythm player, useful for set pieces and calmer possession spells.
Joe Bell.noteZh: 乔·贝尔是新西兰传球节奏点，适合定位球和更冷静的控球阶段。

Kosta Barbarouses.note: Barbarouses brings veteran timing, still useful when counters need a runner beyond Wood.
Kosta Barbarouses.noteZh: 巴巴鲁塞斯带来老将时机，当反击需要伍德之外的前插点时仍然有用。

Lachlan Bayliss.note: Bayliss adds midfield work rate, helping New Zealand stay compact after turnovers.
Lachlan Bayliss.noteZh: 贝利斯增加中场跑动，帮助新西兰在丢球后保持紧凑。

Liberato Cacace.note: Cacace is New Zealand's left-side engine, driving forward while still covering the recovery lane.
Liberato Cacace.noteZh: 卡卡切是新西兰左路发动机，能向前推进，也能覆盖回追线路。

Logan Rogerson.note: Rogerson is a direct wide runner, useful when New Zealand want the next pass to attack space.
Logan Rogerson.noteZh: 罗杰森是直接边路跑动点，当新西兰想让下一脚传球冲击空间时很有用。

Marko Stamenic.note: Stamenic gives New Zealand a ball-carrying midfielder who can turn pressure into territory.
Marko Stamenic.noteZh: 斯塔梅尼奇给新西兰带来能带球的中场，能把压力转成推进空间。

Max Crocombe.note: Crocombe gives New Zealand experienced goalkeeper cover and a steady command of crosses.
Max Crocombe.noteZh: 克罗科姆给新西兰提供经验型门将后备，并能稳定处理传中。

Callum McCowatt.note: McCowatt links midfield to attack, useful for pressing and arriving as the extra runner.
Callum McCowatt.noteZh: 麦考瓦特连接中场和进攻，适合压迫并作为额外跑动点插上。

Michael Boxall.note: Boxall is a veteran defensive organizer, important when New Zealand defend repeat crosses.
Michael Boxall.noteZh: 博克索尔是老将防守组织者，当新西兰防守连续传中时很重要。

Michael Woud.note: Woud adds another goalkeeper option, useful for depth and clean restarts from the back.
Michael Woud.noteZh: 伍德增加又一名门将选择，适合门将深度和后场干净重启。

Nando Pijnaker.note: Pijnaker gives New Zealand left-footed centre-back balance and simple forward passing.
Nando Pijnaker.noteZh: 皮纳克给新西兰带来左脚中卫平衡和简洁向前传球。

Ryan Thomas.note: Thomas gives New Zealand midfield experience, helping them keep the ball after the first escape.
Ryan Thomas.noteZh: 托马斯给新西兰带来中场经验，帮助球队在第一次摆脱后继续控球。

Sarpreet Singh.note: Singh is New Zealand's creative connector, useful when possession needs a sharper final pass.
Sarpreet Singh.noteZh: 辛格是新西兰创造型连接点，当控球需要更犀利的最后一传时很有用。

Tim Payne.summary: Tim Payne is a New Zealand right-back from Wellington Phoenix who gives the national team right-back reliability, wide defending, and overlap support.
Tim Payne.note: Payne is a reliable right-back, balancing defensive work with controlled support outside.
Tim Payne.noteZh: 佩恩是可靠右后卫，能平衡防守工作和外侧可控支援。

Tommy Smith.summary: Tommy Smith is a New Zealand centre-back from Auckland FC who gives the national team experience, aerial duels, and back-line organization.
Tommy Smith.note: Smith gives New Zealand experienced defensive organization, especially useful in low-block stretches.
Tommy Smith.noteZh: 汤米·史密斯给新西兰带来经验型防守组织，尤其适合低位防守阶段。

Tyler Bindon.note: Bindon gives New Zealand a mobile centre-back who can defend space and pass out cleanly.
Tyler Bindon.noteZh: 宾登给新西兰带来机动中卫，能防守空间并干净出球。
